name: Hot Buttered Rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter with an electric mixer at high speed until creamy.
2. Gradually beat in light brown sugar until the mixture is smooth and fluffy.
3. Add softened vanilla ice cream and ground nutmeg to the mixture. Continue beating until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a refrigerator for storage.
To Serve:
1. Pour 1 heaping tablespoon of the mixture into a mug.
2. Add 1 1/2 ounces of rum and 1/2 cup boiling water to the mug.
3. Stir until all ingredients are fully dissolved.
4. Sprinkle with grated nutmeg before serving.
